creator: rs@bytecamp.net
text:
Created attachment 208561
patch for files/mysql-server.in

This patch aligns datadir initialization for mysql57-server with the commands used in the rc.d script for mysql80-server.

mysql_install_db is deprecated since 5.7.6:
https://dev.mysql.com/doc/refman/5.7/en/mysql-install-db.html
